mnemonics: DATE: Display And Time Easily - A command to show system date and time.
keyPoints: The `date` command displays the current system date and time.
It can format output using format specifiers like +%Y-%m-%d.
The superuser can set the system date using `date MMDDhhmm[[CC]YY][.ss]`.
commonMistakes: Forgetting the '+' sign when using format specifiers (e.g., `date %Y` vs `date +%Y`).
Attempting to set the date without superuser (root) privileges.
